title: Top 10 Herbal Tinctures for Mucus in Stomach and Gut Wellness
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra tincture, also known as licorice root tincture, is good for mucus in the stomach because of its anti-inflammatory properties. It has a compound called glycyrrhizin that helps to reduce inflammation in the stomach lining, which can cause ulcers and stomach pain. The tincture also has a soothing effect on the stomach and intestines, helping to calm down any irritation and discomfort. This can be especially helpful for people who have conditions like gastritis or ulcers...
